_comment: Central registry of PRSM contract addresses by network. Updated by operators after a successful deploy + verification. Loaded by Python clients (e.g., PublisherKeyAnchorClient in Phase 3.x.3 Task 3).

hardhat._comment: Local dev; addresses are ephemeral. Filled by `npx hardhat run scripts/deploy-publisher-key-anchor.js --network hardhat` for sanity checking.

sepolia._comment: Sepolia testnet. Updated post-deploy per scripts/deploy-publisher-key-anchor.js. Required env at deploy time: ANCHOR_ADMIN_ADDRESS (designated dev multisig).

base-sepolia._comment: Base Sepolia. Used for cross-network testing matching FTNS layout.

base._comment: Base mainnet. DO NOT populate until Phase 3.x.3 audit clears AND admin is set to the production Foundation multisig per design plan §1.2.
